title: Procter & Gamble India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Procter & Gamble India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Procter & Gamble India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Procter & Gamble India:
Procter & Gamble India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India!
